query:
SELECT 
  dl.corretorId,
  u.name,
  COUNT(*) as total_log,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dl.leadId) as leads_unicos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dl.tipo = 'automatica' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as automatica,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dl.tipo = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manual
FROM distribution_log dl
JOIN users u ON u.id = dl.corretorId
WHERE dl.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY dl.corretorId, u.name
ORDER BY total_log DESC;

SELECT

  u.name,
  COUNT(*) as total_log,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dl.leadId) as leads_unicos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dl.tipo = 'automatica' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as automatica,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dl.tipo = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manual
FROM distribution_log dl
JOIN users u ON u.id = dl.corretorId
WHERE dl.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY dl.corretorId, u.name
ORDER BY total_log DESC;
